code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ color: Color) -> Color
  match color
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn color_name(_ color: Color) -> String
  match color
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut state = Color.Red

  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  match line_opt
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
      match tok_opt
      when Some(tok)
        if tok == "next"
          state = advance(state)
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
  end

  print(color_name(state))
end
